overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic open-world game (Days Gone), showing a character walking along an abandoned rural highway in a mountainous Pacific Northwest setting. The character passes derelict vehicles, a vintage motel sign, and dead bodies while exploring the sunlit, overgrown roadway.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned rural highway near vintage motel

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center of the abandoned road, weapons and gear visible on back

entered.detail: large vintage neon motel sign with 'MOTEL' text and teepee-style top decoration
derelict dark green SUV parked on the roadside with damaged windows
steep rocky terrain with sparse dry grass and scattered pine trees
dense forest of evergreen trees covering the mountain slopes
silver sedan parked near the motel entrance

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking down an abandoned two-lane highway in a rural mountainous area. A prominent vintage motel sign stands to the right while derelict vehicles line the road. The environment is sunlit with clear skies, featuring rocky hillsides and distant pine forests.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with abandoned vehicles and remains

events.description: dead bodies appear scattered across the road surface ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the road, approaching and passing deceased figures lying on the asphalt

entered.detail: multiple deceased human figures lying on the yellow dividing lines of the road
large white box truck with trailer parked on the right shoulder
utility poles with suspended cables running parallel to the road

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along the highway where dead bodies now litter the road surface. A large white semi-truck becomes visible ahead on the right. The motel sign and initial vehicles fall behind as the character moves deeper into the abandoned stretch.

events.description: gas station becomes visible on the right as the character approaches an intersection
character turns left at the intersection, heading up a winding road

agents.ego_description: passing the semi-truck and approaching a gas station, then turning left at the intersection to follow the winding road uphill

entered.detail: small blue and red gas station convenience store with closed shutters
tall rocky mountain peak rising behind the gas station
abandoned blue pickup truck parked on the left side of the intersection
white and orange striped concrete barriers blocking part of the road

segments.scene_description: The character passes the white semi-truck and approaches a blue gas station at a rural intersection. After briefly viewing the mountain backdrop, the character turns left onto a winding road marked with concrete barricades, leaving the main highway.

agents.ego_description: continuing up the winding road past abandoned vehicles and road barriers, heading toward the mountain pass

entered.detail: derelict yellow sedan parked near the concrete barriers
chain-link fencing running along the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the winding mountain road, passing concrete barricades and an abandoned yellow car. The gas station and truck disappear from view behind, while the road curves ahead through the rocky hillside dotted with pine trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate rural highway that eventually winds upward into a rocky mountain pass. It begins with the character walking past a vintage motel sign and derelict vehicles under a clear, sunlit sky. As the character proceeds, the road becomes littered with dead bodies, leading the camera toward a large white semi-truck parked on the right. The scene then shifts toward a blue gas station at a rural intersection before the character turns left, leaving the main highway for a winding road marked by concrete barricades. Finally, the camera ascends the mountain slope, passing an abandoned yellow car as the road curves through a hillside of pine trees and rocky outcrops.
